cards.details:
## Context

fitty is a calorie tracking app built around Mochi, an animated companion that reacts to your daily nutrition progress. The goal was to make habit tracking feel less clinical and more personal.

## What I owned

- Designed and built the full frontend in React + Vite + TypeScript
- Wired up Node.js backend and Supabase for food logging and user data
- Built the Mochi animation system that responds to daily progress state
- Shipped to Vercel (frontend) + Railway (backend)

## Outcome

Live and accessible. The Mochi feedback loop made calorie logging feel less like a chore.
cards.summary: A calorie tracking app with Mochi, an animated companion that reacts to your daily nutrition progress. Built full-stack from scratch.
cards.title: fitty

cards.details:
## Context

HuskyMatch (HuskyConnect) is a student networking platform for UW students to find classmates, collaborators, and community connections through profile-based matching.

## What I owned

- Built the React 19 + Vite frontend with profile creation and editing flows
- Integrated OpenAI embeddings for interest-based recommendation engine
- Set up FastAPI backend with SQLAlchemy and Supabase Postgres
- Implemented direct messaging and social feed features

## Outcome

Full-stack platform with AI-powered matching across student profiles.
cards.summary: A full-stack student networking platform for UW — profile-based matching powered by OpenAI embeddings, with messaging and social feed.
cards.title: HuskyMatch

cards.details:
## Context

LexVault is a legal document search tool designed to help users navigate complex legal documents efficiently. Started from a Figma design and currently implementing as a working frontend.

## What I owned

- Designed the full product in Figma (search UX, document viewer, result ranking)
- Implementing the frontend from the design spec

## Outcome

In progress.
cards.summary: A legal document search tool — designed end-to-end in Figma, currently being implemented.
cards.title: LexVault

cards.details:
## Context

Savorly is a recipe search engine built with BM25 and PyTerrier for an information retrieval course (INFO376). The system preprocesses raw recipe data, builds an inverted index, and supports keyword search.

## What I owned

- Built the full preprocessing pipeline (lowercasing, stopword removal, stemming)
- Implemented BM25 retrieval with PyTerrier
- Designed the index structure for recipe fields (name, ingredients, steps)

## Outcome

Functional search engine returning ranked BM25 results for recipe queries.
cards.summary: A recipe search engine built with BM25 and PyTerrier — preprocesses, indexes, and ranks recipe data for keyword queries.
cards.title: Savorly

cards.details:
## Context

Lark Loom is a group-chat AI agent built for the ByteDance Lark AI Campus Challenge. It lives inside Feishu (Lark) group chats and helps project teams structure the chaos of IM conversations into actionable outputs.

## What I owned

- Designed and implemented the delivery layer (TypeScript + Node.js)
- Built the Skill pipeline: GapDetector → SkillRouter → CardBuilder
- Implemented MessageBuffer sliding window for batching fragmented messages
- Set up CI workflow and enforced Result<T> error boundary across all modules

## Outcome

In competition — finals on May 14, 2026. Covers recall, summary, and archive skill chains end-to-end.
cards.impact: ByteDance Lark AI Campus Challenge — finalist
cards.summary: An AI agent that lives in Feishu group chats, turning fragmented IM conversations into structured docs, task tables, and presentations.
cards.title: Lark Loom

cards.details:
## Context

A discounted airfare discovery platform — helping users find flight deals without getting lost in fare complexity.

## What I owned

- Full product design and frontend implementation

## Outcome

Shipped.
cards.summary: A platform for discovering discounted airfare — making fare search less overwhelming and more decision-friendly.
cards.title: DiscountedAirfare

cards.details:
## Context

BOSS Auto Apply is a Chrome extension that automates bulk job applications on BOSS直聘. Built out of a real frustration: job hunting at scale is repetitive and tedious.

## What I owned

- Built the full Chrome extension (manifest.json, content.js, popup UI)
- Implemented configurable parameters: delivery interval, max count, keyword blocking, auto-pagination
- Added safeguards to avoid rate-limiting (randomized intervals, skip-already-contacted logic)

## Outcome

In progress — actively developing.
cards.summary: A Chrome extension that automates bulk job applications on BOSS直聘 — configurable intervals, keyword filters, and auto-pagination.
cards.title: BOSS Auto Apply
